# Momentum of rest

## Short Teaching Summary
The momentum of any object that is at rest is 0; objects at rest do not have momentum.

## Difficulty
0.00

## Prerequisites
- None recorded.

## Related Concepts
- Quantity of motion and mass (common_mistake_for)

## Misconceptions
- Objects at rest do not have momentum.
